ok. aynı seri için tek foto paylaşıp 10 farklı isim istiyorum. 10'dan fazla varsa daha fazla isterim.
Bir şey sormam geriekior; Paolo Lazzarotti'nin kar oranını %70 yaptım ok. midir?
%80 yaptım da paola için de ok.dir herhalde :D
ee onu da düzeltirim o zaman :D
yeni sanatçımız ne der onu bilemedim asıl
o da eliar ne derse onu der diyelim :D
eevet onları düzeltirim dedim ya zaten :D
80-99 arası duruma göre dedik, ben bence piyasa fiyatlarından başlayalım, duruma göre arttırı hatta azaltırız dedim. O da ok dedi
tamam yani ne konuştuysanız o elbette :)
bi de paolo'nun yatay fotosu (ekren görüntüsünde de var) dikey yüklendi siteye
bu ok. shopyfy'da değiştirmiş biri :D wall art diye :D değişik şeyler oluyordu...
Memeleri gözükmeyen fotolar sadece bunlar canım
Tablet açık ama gelmem gerekiyor bir 2 dkya
Diğerleri güzel değil de işte şeriyata uygun diye

Subject: Collaboration Inquiry for Boudoir Inspiration 2024 Awards
Hello,
My name is [Your Name], and I am the publisher of Boudoir Inspiration magazine. Since 2022, our magazine has been hosting an annual contest to celebrate and promote boudoir photography talent. We have recently launched the 2024 Boudoir Inspiration Awards and would love to feature our contest on your platform to reach a broader audience of photographers.
Could you please provide information on the steps required to list our contest on your website? Additionally, it would be helpful to know if there are any associated fees or specific requirements (such as logo or banner dimensions, links, etc.).
I would be happy to share more details about our contest if needed. Thank you in advance for your support, and I look forward to hearing from you.
Best regards,
[Your Name]
Boudoir Inspiration
[Your Contact Information]

Bebek biz daha önce C4E için ücret ödemiş miydik? Ya da düşünür müyüz?
aşkım buna dikkat: Boudoir Inspiration 2024 Awards değil, Boudoir Photography Awards 2024

C4E başvuruda bizimle ilgili açıklama kısmına bir kural koymuşlar: This content should not be a straight copy paste from your own site or others. The C4E Staff reserves the right to ensure that the content is not a mere copy.

The 2024 Boudoir Photography Awards honor the creativity and passion of boudoir photographers from around the world. Now in its third year, this prestigious annual competition has become a renowned platform for showcasing the elegance and artistry of boudoir photography. Building on the success of its debut in 2022 and an even more remarkable edition in 2023, the awards continue to celebrate photographers who infuse their work with emotion and imagination.
This years event includes the release of a beautifully curated book featuring the winners and shortlisted entries. This stunning collection will present timeless, captivating, and sensual imagery, paying tribute to the extraordinary talent within the boudoir photography community. The book will be available for purchase after the winners are revealed, serving as a cherished keepsake and celebration of the art form.
Böyle farklı şekillerde yazabiliriz, iyi olur bence ne dersin?
Sevgilim müsait olunca geleyim, olmazsan yarın

Listing graphics need to be 850 pixels wide and up to 566 pixels high. The image should be saved as a well optimized JPEG under 200 KB. Please let us know if you need assistance with the graphic. Send an email to info@callforentries.com.

The 2024 Boudoir Photography Awards offer over $12,000 in prizes, including cash rewards, professional website design, exclusive plugins from Retouch4me, print credits with QT Albums, and a feature in a high-quality print and digital book. Winners also receive special badges, certificates, and widespread promotion across Boudoir Inspiration and Believe in Boudoir platforms.
